findings.summary: Default no-write live runs request and accept source edits
limitations: No-write execution and workspace isolation are not yet enforced.

findings.summary: Trusted-run command denylist is syntax-bypassable
limitations: Runtime permission requests are not yet structural.

findings.summary: Delivery stages unrelated tracked and untracked files
limitations: Exact-diff delivery is not yet enforced.

findings.summary: Handoff and promotion gates accept arbitrary strings
limitations: Delivery authorization references are not yet resolved and validated.

findings.summary: Fork-first accepts an origin-equivalent remote
limitations: Fork identity is not yet proven against repository metadata.

findings.summary: Synchronous run start blocks SSE and run control
limitations: Asynchronous run jobs are deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Copied workspaces can share source Git index and HEAD
limitations: True detached workspace isolation is not yet proven.

findings.summary: Lexical containment allows symlink escape
limitations: Canonical path ancestry is not yet enforced across execution and permissions.

findings.summary: Strict delivery ignores the run-level evidence requirement
limitations: Delivery-boundary proof lands in W57; final quality lineage remains in W58.

findings.summary: Mission strictness is selected by project-wide mtime
limitations: Effective evidence lineage is deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Concurrent same-step runs overwrite immutable evidence
limitations: Atomic attempt reservation is not yet implemented.

findings.summary: Scoring and pairwise judge gates are synthetic
limitations: Real evaluation and replay compatibility are deferred to W58.

findings.summary: project_id permits runtime-root traversal
limitations: Canonical identifiers and contained runtime roots are not yet enforced.

findings.summary: Symlinked default .aor follows an external directory
limitations: Runtime-root canonicalization is not yet implemented.

findings.summary: Allowed-path and rename handling fails open
limitations: Mission scope and exact rename handling are not yet strict.

findings.summary: Weak IDs cause state collisions and SSE field injection
limitations: Canonical public IDs and atomic identity allocation are not yet complete.

findings.summary: Concurrent event writers allocate duplicate sequence IDs
limitations: Event append is not yet serialized.

findings.summary: Context and skill assets are neither fully checked nor delivered
limitations: Effective context identity is deferred to W58.

findings.summary: GET routes and initial SPA load mutate clean projects
limitations: Non-materializing read services are deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Local transport permits unauthenticated cross-origin mutation
limitations: Loopback origin and mutation transport enforcement are deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Live event notification is process-local
limitations: Durable live delivery is deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Root test discovery omits files and is load-sensitive
Concurrent commands silently lose transitions
limitations: Atomic run-control command identity is not yet implemented.

findings.summary: Qwen JSONL normalization erases denial semantics
limitations: Adapter denial semantics remain deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Fallback, retry, and repair route references are dropped
limitations: Executable route fallback semantics remain deferred to W58.

findings.summary: retry.on and repair.on do not constrain actions
limitations: Policy action constraints remain deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Replay compatibility ignores content and version fingerprints
limitations: Replay fingerprint enforcement remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Duplicate asset identities resolve last-file-wins
limitations: Unique effective asset identity remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Initialization writes before validation and is non-transactional
limitations: Transactional initialization has not yet landed.

findings.summary: Linked Git worktrees are detected as non-Git projects
limitations: Worktree-safe isolation and initialization have not yet landed.

findings.summary: Module paths with spaces retain percent-encoded URL segments
limitations: Portable filesystem URL resolution has not yet landed.

findings.summary: run status --follow exits after replay
limitations: Durable follow semantics and canonical CLI behavior remain deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Replay accepts zero as all and has no effective bound
limitations: Bounded durable event replay remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Active streams block shutdown and leak resources
limitations: Durable stream lifecycle management remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Documented in-process exports are incomplete and ambiguous
limitations: Canonical API and service exports remain deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Operator-request list ignores limit
limitations: Bounded API list behavior remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: OpenAPI schema and readiness checks disagree with runtime
limitations: Canonical API and OpenAPI alignment remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Unknown command flags are silently accepted
limitations: Strict CLI and API argument validation remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Console does not implement configured detached or live transport
limitations: Executable browser transport behavior remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Stale project refresh can overwrite a new selection
limitations: Web race and project-selection regression proof remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Endpoint failures are rendered as empty connected state
limitations: Web failure-state behavior remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Multi-item interaction queues expose only the first item
limitations: Multi-item interaction behavior remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Add Project drawer is not an accessible modal
limitations: Accessible dialog implementation and browser proof remain deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Web gates scan strings instead of exercising behavior
limitations: Executable browser and component gates remain deferred to W59.

findings.summary: aor app --json bypasses configured redaction
limitations: Canonical redacted CLI output remains deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Mutation bodies are buffered without a size limit
limitations: Loopback transport body bounds remain deferred to W58.

findings.summary: Vite 8.0.14 has two Windows advisories
limitations: W59-S04 retains the dependency-ratchet preservation check.

findings.summary: Control-plane and app-launcher modules form an ESM cycle
limitations: Cycle removal lands in W58; decomposition preservation remains in W59.

findings.summary: Critical flows exceed size and complexity thresholds
limitations: Cross-cutting decomposition remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Public and private contract and runtime kernels drift by copy
limitations: Contract-kernel parity remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Strict TypeScript and diagnostic lint configuration is inert
limitations: Static-analysis enforcement remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Materialized context output is not used by registry roots
limitations: Filesystem cleanup lands in W57; effective context ownership remains in W58.

findings.summary: Dead symbols, imports, and overwritten object fields remain
limitations: Dead-code and private-helper cleanup remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: UI displays a stale hard-coded version
limitations: Runtime-derived console version remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Reference-integrity gate parses examples twice
limitations: Repository-gate performance cleanup remains deferred to W59.

findings.summary: Command and evidence resolution changes with launcher cwd
limitations: Repo-attached first-Mission intake does not prove neutral launch or complete UI-only lifecycle behavior.
